calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes before the court on this date having been sent forthwith from department 206 for a small claims hearing. The Judge, clerk, Plaintiffs Paris Kelley & Henry O Lee, and defendant Dr. Wilmer Jean Stephenson-Feilds are present in court. Court and counsel argue the matter off of the record. Judgement is in favor of the Plaintiff in the amount of $1650, $74 interest and $40 in costs.
